Fuse Description.Fuses Function: Lock for General Purpose fuse register #1 (GP1)
Fuse Description.Setting:
1x' - OP (override protected) & WP (write protected)
'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: Lock for General Purpose fuse register #2 (GP2)
Fuse Description.Setting:
1x' - OP (override protected) & WP (write protected)
'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: BOOT Configuration LOCK
Fuse Description.Setting:
1x' - OP (override protected) & WP (write protected)
'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: Lock for Misc configuration fuse register (MISC_CONF)
Fuse Description.Setting:
1x' - OP (override protected) & WP (write protected)
'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: Lock MAC_ADDR fuses.
Fuse Description.Setting:
1x' - OP (override protected) & WP (write protected)
'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: Lock for General Purpose fuse register #5 (GP5)
Fuse Description.Setting:
1x' - OP (override protected) & WP (write protected)
'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: To Lock Down all the Customer Lock Bits status.

'x1' - RP (read protected)

Fuse Description.Fuses Function: OCOTP includes CRC engine that calculates CRC value based on Start and end address defined in CRC Address Register and matches with the stored value in one of the OCOTP Registers(CRC[7:0]).
Fuse Description.Setting: See OCOTP block guide

Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[30]:
DQS_SEL : 
00: Reserved
01: Pad loopback
10: Reserved
11: External DQS
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[28]:
DLLFSMPF : Selects the Nth tap provided by slave delay-chain, N can vary from '0' to '7'.
Refer SMPR[DLLFSMPF] in QuadSPI Chapter
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[25]: FSDLY: Full Speed Delay selectionRefer SMPR[FSDLY] in QuadSPI Chapter
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[24]:
FSPHS: Full Speed Phase selection
Refer SMPR[FSPHS] in QuadSPI Chapter
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[23]:
TDH : Time Hold Delay
00: Data aligned at PosEdge of Internal reference clock
01: Data aligned with 2X serial flash
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[19]:
CKN
0 : Diffrential Clock not required
1: Diffrential Clock required
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[15]:
XOSC BYPASS MODE SELECTION : Selects XOSC Mode if XOSC Configuration Fuse is not Blown.
0- Differential
1 - Crystal or single bypass mode
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[14]:
QuadSPI CAS
(only valid for HyperFlash Mode)
0000-1111:QuadSPI_SFACR[CAS] Value
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[10]:
CK2
0 : CK2 Clock not required
1: CK2  Clock required
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[8]:
Serial RCON Detection
1 : I2C connected as Serial RCON
0: Parallel RCON
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[4]:
QuadSPI_Mode[3] : Fuse to identify type of flash
000 : Quad Flash
001: HyperFlash 
011 : Octal Flash

CAN_LIN_SRE:

Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[22]:
MMC Boot Modes
0000- 1-bit Normal Speed
0001 - 4-bit Normal Speed 
0010 - 8-bit Normal Speed
0011- 1-bit HIGH Speed
0100 - 4-bit HIGH Speed 
0101 - 8-bit HIGH Speed
0110 - 4-bit DDR HIGH Speed
0111 - 8-bit DDR HIGHl Speed

QuadSPI CAS
(only valid for HyperFlash Mode)
0000-1111:QuadSPI_SFACR[CAS] Value
Boot ROM Fuse Description.BOOT_CFG[12]:
SLAVE DELAY EN
1 :  SLV_DLY_OFFSET and SLV_DLY_COARSE Fuses are used to configure Slave Delay
0 :   BootROM Configured Value used to configure Slave Delay

XOSC_GM_SEL : 
GM Sel value for relevent XOSC Mode

CK2
0 : CK2 Clock not required

PAD_OVERRIDE_EN : Enable PAD override for QuadSPI/uSDHC
0: Disabled
1: Enabled

 PAD Slew Rate Value Applies to all QuadSPI/uSDHC PADs
